text:
Market today: The mood is cautious for chip stocks, with an "AI sell-off" hitting Asian markets. This directly impacts your heavily concentrated tech/chip portfolio.

Your holdings: SOXL (-44.02%) and SPAL (-41.51%) are deep in the red and leveraged; margin amplifies these drops. QQQ (-1.22%), SMH (-10.6%), and QQQI (-2.52%) are also marked for trimming.

Watch: Monitor the broader tech/chip sector for continued weakness following the AI sell-off. Pay close attention to your leveraged ETFs for further decay.

Bottom line: Prioritize risk management, especially with your concentrated, leveraged positions, in a potentially softening tech market.
plays: Trim SOXL and SPAL due to deep losses, leveraged decay, and margin risk.
Review QQQ, SMH, QQQI for trimming as scanner indicates.
No new buys today; hold and watch for clarity on the tech/chip sell-off.
